title: 信息日报 2026-06-30

headline.title: Ornith-1.0 发布：自扩展开源模型，专为智能编码打造
headline.summary: DeepReinforce 发布 Ornith-1.0，首个自扩展开源模型系列，基于 Gemma 4 和 Qwen 3.5，提供 9B 到 397B 多种规模，在智能编码任务上达到开源最佳性能。
headline.title_en: Ornith-1.0: Self-Scaffolding LLMs for Agentic Coding
headline.summary_en: DeepReinforce releases Ornith-1.0, the first self-scaffolding open-source model series built on Gemma 4 and Qwen 3.5, ranging from 9B to 397B parameters, achieving state-of-the-art performance among open-source models for agentic coding tasks.
headline.original_title: Ornith-1.0: Self-Scaffolding LLMs for Agentic Coding
headline.reason: 该模型在开发者社区引发热议，代表了开源 AI 编码工具的重大进步，且评分最高（11.1），对 AI 和开发版块均有深远影响。
headline.reason_en: This model has generated significant buzz in the developer community, represents a major advancement in open-source AI coding tools, and has the highest score (11.1), with implications for both AI and development sections.
